listings_tried.reason: Tier 1 PASS — Tier 2 FAIL. No sold count in snippet, no Shopping panel, no regional domain.

Passed Tier 2C experimental rule (de.aliexpress.com = 1 regional domain). User opened URL — dead page confirmed. Conclusion: regional domain indexing is stale cache just like main .com indexing. Single regional domain is NOT a liveness signal.
